texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: This Regulation applies to the processing of personal data in the context of the activities of an establishment of a controller or a processor in the Union, regardless of whether the processing takes place in the Union or not.
texts.text: This Regulation applies to the processing of personal data in the context of the activities of an establishment of a controller or a processor in the Union, regardless of whether the processing takes place in the Union or not.

texts.text: This Regulation applies to the processing of personal data of data subjects who are in the Union by a controller or processor not established in the Union, where the processing activities are related to:

texts.text: (a) the offering of goods or services, irrespective of whether a payment of the data subject is required, to such data subjects in the Union; or

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Definitions
texts.text: Definitions

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For  the purposes of this Regulation:
texts.text: For  the purposes of this Regulation:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (1) 'personal data' means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person ('data subject'); an identifiable natural person is one who can be identified, directly or indirectly, in particular by reference to an identifier such as a name, an identification number, location data, an online identifier or to one or more factors specific to the physical, physiological, genetic, mental, economic, cultural or social identity of that natural person;
texts.text: (1) 'personal data' means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person ('data subject'); an identifiable natural person is one who can be identified, directly or indirectly, in particular by reference to an identifier such as a name, an identification number, location data, an online identifier or to one or more factors specific to the physical, physiological, genetic, mental, economic, cultural or social identity of that natural person;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (2) 'processing' means any operation or set of operations which is performed on personal data or on sets of personal data, whether or not by automated means, such as collection, recording, organisation, structuring, storage, adaptation or alteration, retrieval, consultation, use, disclosure by transmission, dissemination or otherwise making available, alignment or combination, restriction, erasure or destruction;
texts.text: (2) 'processing' means any operation or set of operations which is performed on personal data or on sets of personal data, whether or not by automated means, such as collection, recording, organisation, structuring, storage, adaptation or alteration, retrieval, consultation, use, disclosure by transmission, dissemination or otherwise making available, alignment or combination, restriction, erasure or destruction;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (3) 'restriction of processing' means the marking of stored personal data with the aim of limiting their processing in the future;
texts.text: (3) 'restriction of processing' means the marking of stored personal data with the aim of limiting their processing in the future;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (4) 'profiling' means any form of automated processing of personal data consisting of the use of personal data to evaluate certain personal aspects relating to a natural person, in particular to analyse or predict aspects concerning that natural person's performance at work, economic situation, health, personal preferences, interests, reliability, behaviour, location or movements;
texts.text: (4) 'profiling' means any form of automated processing of personal data consisting of the use of personal data to evaluate certain personal aspects relating to a natural person, in particular to analyse or predict aspects concerning that natural person's performance at work, economic situation, health, personal preferences, interests, reliability, behaviour, location or movements;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (5) 'pseudonymisation' means the processing of personal data in such a manner that the personal data can no longer be attributed to a specific data subject without the use of additional information, provided that such additional information is kept separately and is subject to technical and organisational measures to ensure that the personal data are not attributed to an identified or identifiable natural person;
texts.text: (5) 'pseudonymisation' means the processing of personal data in such a manner that the personal data can no longer be attributed to a specific data subject without the use of additional information, provided that such additional information is kept separately and is subject to technical and organisational measures to ensure that the personal data are not attributed to an identified or identifiable natural person;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (6) 'filing system' means any structured set of personal data which are accessible according to specific criteria, whether centralised, decentralised or dispersed on a functional or geographical basis;
texts.text: (6) 'filing system' means any structured set of personal data which are accessible according to specific criteria, whether centralised, decentralised or dispersed on a functional or geographical basis;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (7) 'controller' means the natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which, alone or jointly with others, determines the purposes and means of the processing of personal data; where the purposes and means of such processing are determined by Union or Member State law, the controller or the specific criteria for its nomination may be provided for by Union or Member State law;
texts.text: (7) 'controller' means the natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which, alone or jointly with others, determines the purposes and means of the processing of personal data; where the purposes and means of such processing are determined by Union or Member State law, the controller or the specific criteria for its nomination may be provided for by Union or Member State law;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (8) 'processor' means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which processes personal data on behalf of the controller;
texts.text: (8) 'processor' means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body which processes personal data on behalf of the controller;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (9) 'recipient' means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or another body, to which the personal data are disclosed, whether a third party or not. However, public authorities which may receive personal data in the
texts.text: (9) 'recipient' means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or another body, to which the personal data are disclosed, whether a third party or not. However, public authorities which may receive personal data in the

texts.label: text
texts.orig: framework  of  a  particular  inquiry  in  accordance  with  Union  or  Member  State  law  shall  not  be  regarded  as recipients;  the  processing  of  those  data  by  those  public  authorities  shall  be  in  compliance  with  the  applicable  data protection rules according to the purposes of the processing;
texts.text: framework  of  a  particular  inquiry  in  accordance  with  Union  or  Member  State  law  shall  not  be  regarded  as recipients;  the  processing  of  those  data  by  those  public  authorities  shall  be  in  compliance  with  the  applicable  data protection rules according to the purposes of the processing;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (10) 'third party' means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or body other than the data subject, controller, processor and persons who, under the direct authority of the controller or processor, are authorised to process personal data;
texts.text: (10) 'third party' means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or body other than the data subject, controller, processor and persons who, under the direct authority of the controller or processor, are authorised to process personal data;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (11) 'consent' of the data subject means any freely given, specific, informed and unambiguous indication of the data subject's wishes by which he or she, by a statement or by a clear affirmative action, signifies agreement to the processing of personal data relating to him or her;
texts.text: (11) 'consent' of the data subject means any freely given, specific, informed and unambiguous indication of the data subject's wishes by which he or she, by a statement or by a clear affirmative action, signifies agreement to the processing of personal data relating to him or her;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (12) 'personal data breach' means a breach of security leading to the accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorised disclosure of, or access to, personal data transmitted, stored or otherwise processed;
texts.text: (12) 'personal data breach' means a breach of security leading to the accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorised disclosure of, or access to, personal data transmitted, stored or otherwise processed;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (13) 'genetic data' means personal data relating to the inherited or acquired genetic characteristics of a natural person which give unique information about the physiology or the health of that natural person and which result, in particular, from an analysis of a biological sample from the natural person in question;
texts.text: (13) 'genetic data' means personal data relating to the inherited or acquired genetic characteristics of a natural person which give unique information about the physiology or the health of that natural person and which result, in particular, from an analysis of a biological sample from the natural person in question;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (14) 'biometric data' means personal data resulting from specific technical processing relating to the physical, physio­ logical or behavioural characteristics of a natural person, which allow or confirm the unique identification of that natural person, such as facial images or dactyloscopic data;
texts.text: (14) 'biometric data' means personal data resulting from specific technical processing relating to the physical, physio logical or behavioural characteristics of a natural person, which allow or confirm the unique identification of that natural person, such as facial images or dactyloscopic data;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (15) 'data concerning health' means personal data related to the physical or mental health of a natural person, including the provision of health care services, which reveal information about his or her health status;
texts.text: (15) 'data concerning health' means personal data related to the physical or mental health of a natural person, including the provision of health care services, which reveal information about his or her health status;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (16) 'main establishment' means:
texts.text: (16) 'main establishment' means:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) as regards a controller with establishments in more than one Member State, the place of its central adminis­ tration in the Union, unless the decisions on the purposes and means of the processing of personal data are taken in another establishment of the controller in the Union and the latter establishment has the power to have such decisions implemented, in which case the establishment having taken such decisions is to be considered to be the main establishment;
texts.text: (a) as regards a controller with establishments in more than one Member State, the place of its central adminis tration in the Union, unless the decisions on the purposes and means of the processing of personal data are taken in another establishment of the controller in the Union and the latter establishment has the power to have such decisions implemented, in which case the establishment having taken such decisions is to be considered to be the main establishment;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) as regards a processor with establishments in more than one Member State, the place of its central adminis­ tration in the Union, or, if the processor has no central administration in the Union, the establishment of the processor in the Union where the main processing activities in the context of the activities of an establishment of the processor take place to the extent that the processor is subject to specific obligations under this Regulation;
texts.text: (b) as regards a processor with establishments in more than one Member State, the place of its central adminis tration in the Union, or, if the processor has no central administration in the Union, the establishment of the processor in the Union where the main processing activities in the context of the activities of an establishment of the processor take place to the extent that the processor is subject to specific obligations under this Regulation;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (17) 'representative' means a natural or legal person established in the Union who, designated by the controller or processor in writing pursuant to Article 27, represents the controller or processor with regard to their respective obligations under this Regulation;
texts.text: (17) 'representative' means a natural or legal person established in the Union who, designated by the controller or processor in writing pursuant to Article 27, represents the controller or processor with regard to their respective obligations under this Regulation;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (18) 'enterprise' means a natural or legal person engaged in an economic activity, irrespective of its legal form, including partnerships or associations regularly engaged in an economic activity;
texts.text: (18) 'enterprise' means a natural or legal person engaged in an economic activity, irrespective of its legal form, including partnerships or associations regularly engaged in an economic activity;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (19) 'group of undertakings' means a controlling undertaking and its controlled undertakings;
texts.text: (19) 'group of undertakings' means a controlling undertaking and its controlled undertakings;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (20) 'binding corporate rules' means personal data protection policies which are adhered to by a controller or processor established on the territory of a Member State for transfers or a set of transfers of personal data to a controller or processor in one or more third countries within a group of undertakings, or group of enterprises engaged in a joint economic activity;
texts.text: (20) 'binding corporate rules' means personal data protection policies which are adhered to by a controller or processor established on the territory of a Member State for transfers or a set of transfers of personal data to a controller or processor in one or more third countries within a group of undertakings, or group of enterprises engaged in a joint economic activity;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (21) 'supervisory authority' means an independent public authority which is established by a Member State pursuant to Article 51;
texts.text: (21) 'supervisory authority' means an independent public authority which is established by a Member State pursuant to Article 51;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (22) 'supervisory authority concerned' means a supervisory authority which is concerned by the processing of personal data because:
texts.text: (22) 'supervisory authority concerned' means a supervisory authority which is concerned by the processing of personal data because:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the controller or processor is established on the territory of the Member State of that supervisory authority;
texts.text: (a) the controller or processor is established on the territory of the Member State of that supervisory authority;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) data subjects residing in the Member State of that supervisory authority are substantially affected or likely to be substantially affected by the processing; or
texts.text: (b) data subjects residing in the Member State of that supervisory authority are substantially affected or likely to be substantially affected by the processing; or

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) a complaint has been lodged with that supervisory authority;
texts.text: (c) a complaint has been lodged with that supervisory authority;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (23) 'cross-border processing' means either:
texts.text: (23) 'cross-border processing' means either:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) processing of personal data which takes place in the context of the activities of establishments in more than one Member State of a controller or processor in the Union where the controller or processor is established in more than one Member State; or
texts.text: (a) processing of personal data which takes place in the context of the activities of establishments in more than one Member State of a controller or processor in the Union where the controller or processor is established in more than one Member State; or

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) processing of personal data which takes place in the context of the activities of a single establishment of a controller or processor in the Union but which substantially affects or is likely to substantially affect data subjects in more than one Member State.
texts.text: (b) processing of personal data which takes place in the context of the activities of a single establishment of a controller or processor in the Union but which substantially affects or is likely to substantially affect data subjects in more than one Member State.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (24) 'relevant and reasoned objection' means an objection to a draft decision as to whether there is an infringement of this Regulation, or whether envisaged action in relation to the controller or processor complies with this Regulation, which clearly demonstrates the significance of the risks posed by the draft decision as regards the fundamental rights and freedoms of data subjects and, where applicable, the free flow of personal data within the Union;
texts.text: (24) 'relevant and reasoned objection' means an objection to a draft decision as to whether there is an infringement of this Regulation, or whether envisaged action in relation to the controller or processor complies with this Regulation, which clearly demonstrates the significance of the risks posed by the draft decision as regards the fundamental rights and freedoms of data subjects and, where applicable, the free flow of personal data within the Union;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (25) 'information society service' means a service as defined in point (b) of Article 1(1) of Directive (EU) 2015/1535 of the European Parliament and of the Council ( 1 );
texts.text: (25) 'information society service' means a service as defined in point (b) of Article 1(1) of Directive (EU) 2015/1535 of the European Parliament and of the Council ( 1 );

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (26) 'international organisation' means an organisation and its subordinate bodies governed by public international law, or any other body which is set up by, or on the basis of, an agreement between two or more countries.
texts.text: (26) 'international organisation' means an organisation and its subordinate bodies governed by public international law, or any other body which is set up by, or on the basis of, an agreement between two or more countries.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHAPTER II
texts.text: CHAPTER II

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Principles
texts.text: Principles

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 5
texts.text: Article 5

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Principles relating to processing of personal data
texts.text: Principles relating to processing of personal data

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Personal data shall be:
texts.text: Personal data shall be:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) processed lawfully, fairly and in a transparent manner in relation to the data subject ('lawfulness, fairness and transparency');
texts.text: (a) processed lawfully, fairly and in a transparent manner in relation to the data subject ('lawfulness, fairness and transparency');

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) collected for specified, explicit and legitimate purposes and not further processed in a manner that is incompatible with those purposes; further processing for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes shall, in accordance with Article 89(1), not be considered to be incompatible with the initial purposes ('purpose limitation');
texts.text: (b) collected for specified, explicit and legitimate purposes and not further processed in a manner that is incompatible with those purposes; further processing for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes shall, in accordance with Article 89(1), not be considered to be incompatible with the initial purposes ('purpose limitation');

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) adequate, relevant and limited to what is necessary in relation to the purposes for which they are processed ('data minimisation');
texts.text: (c) adequate, relevant and limited to what is necessary in relation to the purposes for which they are processed ('data minimisation');

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) accurate and, where necessary, kept up to date; every reasonable step must be taken to ensure that personal data that are inaccurate, having regard to the purposes for which they are processed, are erased or rectified without delay ('accuracy');
texts.text: (d) accurate and, where necessary, kept up to date; every reasonable step must be taken to ensure that personal data that are inaccurate, having regard to the purposes for which they are processed, are erased or rectified without delay ('accuracy');

texts.label: text
texts.orig: ( 1 ) Directive  (EU)  2015/1535  of  the  European  Parliament  and  of  the  Council  of  9  September  2015  laying  down  a  procedure  for  the provision of information in the field of technical regulations and of rules on Information Society services (OJ L 241, 17.9.2015, p. 1).
texts.text: ( 1 ) Directive  (EU)  2015/1535  of  the  European  Parliament  and  of  the  Council  of  9  September  2015  laying  down  a  procedure  for  the provision of information in the field of technical regulations and of rules on Information Society services (OJ L 241, 17.9.2015, p. 1).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) kept in a form which permits identification of data subjects for no longer than is necessary for the purposes for which the personal data are processed; personal data may be stored for longer periods insofar as the personal data will be processed solely for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1) subject to implementation of the appropriate technical and organisational measures required by this Regulation in order to safeguard the rights and freedoms of the data subject ('storage limitation');
texts.text: (e) kept in a form which permits identification of data subjects for no longer than is necessary for the purposes for which the personal data are processed; personal data may be stored for longer periods insofar as the personal data will be processed solely for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1) subject to implementation of the appropriate technical and organisational measures required by this Regulation in order to safeguard the rights and freedoms of the data subject ('storage limitation');

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (f) processed in a manner that ensures appropriate security of the personal data, including protection against unauthorised or unlawful processing and against accidental loss, destruction or damage, using appropriate technical or organisational measures ('integrity and confidentiality').
texts.text: (f) processed in a manner that ensures appropriate security of the personal data, including protection against unauthorised or unlawful processing and against accidental loss, destruction or damage, using appropriate technical or organisational measures ('integrity and confidentiality').

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The controller shall be responsible for, and be able to demonstrate compliance with, paragraph 1 ('accountability').
texts.text: The controller shall be responsible for, and be able to demonstrate compliance with, paragraph 1 ('accountability').

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 6
texts.text: Article 6

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Lawfulness of processing
texts.text: Lawfulness of processing

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies:
texts.text: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one of the following applies:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the data subject has given consent to the processing of his or her personal data for one or more specific purposes;
texts.text: (a) the data subject has given consent to the processing of his or her personal data for one or more specific purposes;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) processing is necessary for the performance of a contract to which the data subject is party or in order to take steps at the request of the data subject prior to entering into a contract;
texts.text: (b) processing is necessary for the performance of a contract to which the data subject is party or in order to take steps at the request of the data subject prior to entering into a contract;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation to which the controller is subject;
texts.text: (c) processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation to which the controller is subject;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) processing is necessary in order to protect the vital interests of the data subject or of another natural person;
texts.text: (d) processing is necessary in order to protect the vital interests of the data subject or of another natural person;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) processing is necessary for the performance of a task carried out in the public interest or in the exercise of official authority vested in the controller;
texts.text: (e) processing is necessary for the performance of a task carried out in the public interest or in the exercise of official authority vested in the controller;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (f) processing is necessary for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party, except where such interests are overridden by the interests or fundamental rights and freedoms of the data subject which require protection of personal data, in particular where the data subject is a child.
texts.text: (f) processing is necessary for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party, except where such interests are overridden by the interests or fundamental rights and freedoms of the data subject which require protection of personal data, in particular where the data subject is a child.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Point  (f)  of  the  first  subparagraph  shall  not  apply  to  processing  carried  out  by  public  authorities  in  the  performance  of their  tasks.
texts.text: Point  (f)  of  the  first  subparagraph  shall  not  apply  to  processing  carried  out  by  public  authorities  in  the  performance  of their  tasks.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Member States may maintain or introduce more specific provisions to adapt the application of the rules of this Regulation with regard to processing for compliance with points (c) and (e) of paragraph 1 by determining more precisely specific requirements for the processing and other measures to ensure lawful and fair processing including for other specific processing situations as provided for in Chapter IX.
texts.text: Member States may maintain or introduce more specific provisions to adapt the application of the rules of this Regulation with regard to processing for compliance with points (c) and (e) of paragraph 1 by determining more precisely specific requirements for the processing and other measures to ensure lawful and fair processing including for other specific processing situations as provided for in Chapter IX.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The basis for the processing referred to in point (c) and (e) of paragraph 1 shall be laid down by:
texts.text: The basis for the processing referred to in point (c) and (e) of paragraph 1 shall be laid down by:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) Union law; or
texts.text: (a) Union law; or

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) Member State law to which the controller is subject.
texts.text: (b) Member State law to which the controller is subject.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The purpose of the processing shall be determined in that legal basis or, as regards the processing referred to in point (e) of  paragraph  1,  shall  be  necessary  for  the  performance  of  a  task  carried  out  in  the  public  interest  or  in  the  exercise  of official  authority  vested  in  the  controller.  That  legal  basis  may  contain  specific  provisions  to  adapt  the  application  of rules  of  this  Regulation,  inter  alia:  the  general  conditions  governing  the  lawfulness  of  processing  by  the  controller;  the types  of  data  which  are  subject  to  the  processing;  the  data  subjects  concerned;  the  entities  to,  and  the  purposes  for which,  the  personal  data  may  be  disclosed;  the  purpose  limitation;  storage  periods;  and  processing  operations  and processing  procedures,  including  measures  to  ensure  lawful  and  fair processing  such  as  those  for  other  specific processing  situations  as  provided  for  in  Chapter  IX.  The  Union  or  the  Member  State  law  shall  meet  an  objective  of public interest and be proportionate to the legitimate aim pursued.
texts.text: The purpose of the processing shall be determined in that legal basis or, as regards the processing referred to in point (e) of  paragraph  1,  shall  be  necessary  for  the  performance  of  a  task  carried  out  in  the  public  interest  or  in  the  exercise  of official  authority  vested  in  the  controller.  That  legal  basis  may  contain  specific  provisions  to  adapt  the  application  of rules  of  this  Regulation,  inter  alia:  the  general  conditions  governing  the  lawfulness  of  processing  by  the  controller;  the types  of  data  which  are  subject  to  the  processing;  the  data  subjects  concerned;  the  entities  to,  and  the  purposes  for which,  the  personal  data  may  be  disclosed;  the  purpose  limitation;  storage  periods;  and  processing  operations  and processing  procedures,  including  measures  to  ensure  lawful  and  fair processing  such  as  those  for  other  specific processing  situations  as  provided  for  in  Chapter  IX.  The  Union  or  the  Member  State  law  shall  meet  an  objective  of public interest and be proportionate to the legitimate aim pursued.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a Union or Member State law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in Article 23(1), the controller shall, in order to ascertain whether processing for another purpose is compatible with the purpose for which the personal data are initially collected, take into account, inter alia:
texts.text: Where the processing for a purpose other than that for which the personal data have been collected is not based on the data subject's consent or on a Union or Member State law which constitutes a necessary and proportionate measure in a democratic society to safeguard the objectives referred to in Article 23(1), the controller shall, in order to ascertain whether processing for another purpose is compatible with the purpose for which the personal data are initially collected, take into account, inter alia:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) any link between the purposes for which the personal data have been collected and the purposes of the intended further processing;
texts.text: (a) any link between the purposes for which the personal data have been collected and the purposes of the intended further processing;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the context in which the personal data have been collected, in particular regarding the relationship between data subjects and the controller;
texts.text: (b) the context in which the personal data have been collected, in particular regarding the relationship between data subjects and the controller;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) the nature of the personal data, in particular whether special categories of personal data are processed, pursuant to Article 9, or whether personal data related to criminal convictions and offences are processed, pursuant to Article 10;
texts.text: (c) the nature of the personal data, in particular whether special categories of personal data are processed, pursuant to Article 9, or whether personal data related to criminal convictions and offences are processed, pursuant to Article 10;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) the possible consequences of the intended further processing for data subjects;
texts.text: (d) the possible consequences of the intended further processing for data subjects;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) the existence of appropriate safeguards, which may include encryption or pseudonymisation.
texts.text: (e) the existence of appropriate safeguards, which may include encryption or pseudonymisation.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 7
texts.text: Article 7

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Conditions for consent
texts.text: Conditions for consent

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Where processing is based on consent, the controller shall be able to demonstrate that the data subject has consented to processing of his or her personal data.
texts.text: Where processing is based on consent, the controller shall be able to demonstrate that the data subject has consented to processing of his or her personal data.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: If the data subject's consent is given in the context of a written declaration which also concerns other matters, the request for consent shall be presented in a manner which is clearly distinguishable from the other matters, in an intelligible and easily accessible form, using clear and plain language. Any part of such a declaration which constitutes an infringement of this Regulation shall not be binding.
texts.text: If the data subject's consent is given in the context of a written declaration which also concerns other matters, the request for consent shall be presented in a manner which is clearly distinguishable from the other matters, in an intelligible and easily accessible form, using clear and plain language. Any part of such a declaration which constitutes an infringement of this Regulation shall not be binding.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The data subject shall have the right to withdraw his or her consent at any time. The withdrawal of consent shall not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal. Prior to giving consent, the data subject shall be informed thereof. It shall be as easy to withdraw as to give consent.
texts.text: The data subject shall have the right to withdraw his or her consent at any time. The withdrawal of consent shall not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal. Prior to giving consent, the data subject shall be informed thereof. It shall be as easy to withdraw as to give consent.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: When assessing whether consent is freely given, utmost account shall be taken of whether, inter alia , the performance of a contract, including the provision of a service, is conditional on consent to the processing of personal data that is not necessary for the performance of that contract.
texts.text: When assessing whether consent is freely given, utmost account shall be taken of whether, inter alia , the performance of a contract, including the provision of a service, is conditional on consent to the processing of personal data that is not necessary for the performance of that contract.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 8
texts.text: Article 8

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Conditions applicable to child's consent in relation to information society services
texts.text: Conditions applicable to child's consent in relation to information society services

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Where point (a) of Article 6(1) applies, in relation to the offer of information society services directly to a child, the processing of the personal data of a child shall be lawful where the child is at least 16 years old. Where the child is below the age of 16 years, such processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that consent is given or authorised by the holder of parental responsibility over the child.
texts.text: Where point (a) of Article 6(1) applies, in relation to the offer of information society services directly to a child, the processing of the personal data of a child shall be lawful where the child is at least 16 years old. Where the child is below the age of 16 years, such processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that consent is given or authorised by the holder of parental responsibility over the child.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Member  States  may  provide  by  law  for  a  lower  age  for  those  purposes  provided  that  such  lower  age  is  not  below  13 years.
texts.text: Member  States  may  provide  by  law  for  a  lower  age  for  those  purposes  provided  that  such  lower  age  is  not  below  13 years.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The controller shall make reasonable efforts to verify in such cases that consent is given or authorised by the holder of parental responsibility over the child, taking into consideration available technology.
texts.text: The controller shall make reasonable efforts to verify in such cases that consent is given or authorised by the holder of parental responsibility over the child, taking into consideration available technology.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Paragraph 1 shall not affect the general contract law of Member States such as the rules on the validity, formation or effect of a contract in relation to a child.
texts.text: Paragraph 1 shall not affect the general contract law of Member States such as the rules on the validity, formation or effect of a contract in relation to a child.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 9
texts.text: Article 9

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Processing of special categories of personal data
texts.text: Processing of special categories of personal data

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Processing of personal data revealing racial or ethnic origin, political opinions, religious or philosophical beliefs, or trade union membership, and the processing of genetic data, biometric data for the purpose of uniquely identifying a natural person, data concerning health or data concerning a natural person's sex life or sexual orientation shall be prohibited.
texts.text: Processing of personal data revealing racial or ethnic origin, political opinions, religious or philosophical beliefs, or trade union membership, and the processing of genetic data, biometric data for the purpose of uniquely identifying a natural person, data concerning health or data concerning a natural person's sex life or sexual orientation shall be prohibited.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Paragraph 1 shall not apply if one of the following applies:
texts.text: Paragraph 1 shall not apply if one of the following applies:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the data subject has given explicit consent to the processing of those personal data for one or more specified purposes, except where Union or Member State law provide that the prohibition referred to in paragraph 1 may not be lifted by the data subject;
texts.text: (a) the data subject has given explicit consent to the processing of those personal data for one or more specified purposes, except where Union or Member State law provide that the prohibition referred to in paragraph 1 may not be lifted by the data subject;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) processing is necessary for the purposes of carrying out the obligations and exercising specific rights of the controller or of the data subject in the field of employment and social security and social protection law in so far as it is authorised by Union or Member State law or a collective agreement pursuant to Member State law providing for appropriate safeguards for the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject;
texts.text: (b) processing is necessary for the purposes of carrying out the obligations and exercising specific rights of the controller or of the data subject in the field of employment and social security and social protection law in so far as it is authorised by Union or Member State law or a collective agreement pursuant to Member State law providing for appropriate safeguards for the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) processing is necessary to protect the vital interests of the data subject or of another natural person where the data subject is physically or legally incapable of giving consent;
texts.text: (c) processing is necessary to protect the vital interests of the data subject or of another natural person where the data subject is physically or legally incapable of giving consent;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) processing is carried out in the course of its legitimate activities with appropriate safeguards by a foundation, association or any other not-for-profit body with a political, philosophical, religious or trade union aim and on condition that the processing relates solely to the members or to former members of the body or to persons who have regular contact with it in connection with its purposes and that the personal data are not disclosed outside that body without the consent of the data subjects;
texts.text: (d) processing is carried out in the course of its legitimate activities with appropriate safeguards by a foundation, association or any other not-for-profit body with a political, philosophical, religious or trade union aim and on condition that the processing relates solely to the members or to former members of the body or to persons who have regular contact with it in connection with its purposes and that the personal data are not disclosed outside that body without the consent of the data subjects;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) processing relates to personal data which are manifestly made public by the data subject;
texts.text: (e) processing relates to personal data which are manifestly made public by the data subject;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (f) processing is necessary for the establishment, exercise or defence of legal claims or whenever courts are acting in their judicial capacity;
texts.text: (f) processing is necessary for the establishment, exercise or defence of legal claims or whenever courts are acting in their judicial capacity;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (g) processing is necessary for reasons of substantial public interest, on the basis of Union or Member State law which shall be proportionate to the aim pursued, respect the essence of the right to data protection and provide for suitable and specific measures to safeguard the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject;
texts.text: (g) processing is necessary for reasons of substantial public interest, on the basis of Union or Member State law which shall be proportionate to the aim pursued, respect the essence of the right to data protection and provide for suitable and specific measures to safeguard the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (h) processing is necessary for the purposes of preventive or occupational medicine, for the assessment of the working capacity of the employee, medical diagnosis, the provision of health or social care or treatment or the management of health or social care systems and services on the basis of Union or Member State law or pursuant to contract with a health professional and subject to the conditions and safeguards referred to in paragraph 3;
texts.text: (h) processing is necessary for the purposes of preventive or occupational medicine, for the assessment of the working capacity of the employee, medical diagnosis, the provision of health or social care or treatment or the management of health or social care systems and services on the basis of Union or Member State law or pursuant to contract with a health professional and subject to the conditions and safeguards referred to in paragraph 3;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (i) processing is necessary for reasons of public interest in the area of public health, such as protecting against serious cross-border threats to health or ensuring high standards of quality and safety of health care and of medicinal products or medical devices, on the basis of Union or Member State law which provides for suitable and specific measures to safeguard the rights and freedoms of the data subject, in particular professional secrecy;
texts.text: (i) processing is necessary for reasons of public interest in the area of public health, such as protecting against serious cross-border threats to health or ensuring high standards of quality and safety of health care and of medicinal products or medical devices, on the basis of Union or Member State law which provides for suitable and specific measures to safeguard the rights and freedoms of the data subject, in particular professional secrecy;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (j) processing is necessary for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1) based on Union or Member State law which shall be propor­ tionate to the aim pursued, respect the essence of the right to data protection and provide for suitable and specific measures to safeguard the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject.
texts.text: (j) processing is necessary for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes in accordance with Article 89(1) based on Union or Member State law which shall be propor tionate to the aim pursued, respect the essence of the right to data protection and provide for suitable and specific measures to safeguard the fundamental rights and the interests of the data subject.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Personal data referred to in paragraph 1 may be processed for the purposes referred to in point (h) of paragraph 2 when those data are processed by or under the responsibility of a professional subject to the obligation of professional secrecy under Union or Member State law or rules established by national competent bodies or by another person also subject to an obligation of secrecy under Union or Member State law or rules established by national competent bodies.
texts.text: Personal data referred to in paragraph 1 may be processed for the purposes referred to in point (h) of paragraph 2 when those data are processed by or under the responsibility of a professional subject to the obligation of professional secrecy under Union or Member State law or rules established by national competent bodies or by another person also subject to an obligation of secrecy under Union or Member State law or rules established by national competent bodies.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Member States may maintain or introduce further conditions, including limitations, with regard to the processing of genetic data, biometric data or data concerning health.
texts.text: Member States may maintain or introduce further conditions, including limitations, with regard to the processing of genetic data, biometric data or data concerning health.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 10
texts.text: Article 10

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Processing of personal data relating to criminal convictions and offences
texts.text: Processing of personal data relating to criminal convictions and offences

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Processing  of  personal  data  relating  to  criminal  convictions  and  offences  or related  security  measures  based  on Article  6(1)  shall  be  carried  out  only  under  the  control  of  official  authority  or  when  the  processing  is  authorised  by Union  or  Member  State  law  providing  for  appropriate  safeguards  for  the  rights  and  freedoms  of  data  subjects.  Any comprehensive register of criminal convictions shall be kept only under  the control of official authority.
texts.text: Processing  of  personal  data  relating  to  criminal  convictions  and  offences  or related  security  measures  based  on Article  6(1)  shall  be  carried  out  only  under  the  control  of  official  authority  or  when  the  processing  is  authorised  by Union  or  Member  State  law  providing  for  appropriate  safeguards  for  the  rights  and  freedoms  of  data  subjects.  Any comprehensive register of criminal convictions shall be kept only under  the control of official authority.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 11
texts.text: Article 11

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Processing which does not require identification
texts.text: Processing which does not require identification

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: If the purposes for which a controller processes personal data do not or do no longer require the identification of a data subject by the controller, the controller shall not be obliged to maintain, acquire or process additional information in order to identify the data subject for the sole purpose of complying with this Regulation.
texts.text: If the purposes for which a controller processes personal data do not or do no longer require the identification of a data subject by the controller, the controller shall not be obliged to maintain, acquire or process additional information in order to identify the data subject for the sole purpose of complying with this Regulation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Where, in cases referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, the controller is able to demonstrate that it is not in a position to identify the data subject, the controller shall inform the data subject accordingly, if possible. In such cases, Articles 15 to 20 shall not apply except where the data subject, for the purpose of exercising his or her rights under those articles, provides additional information enabling his or her identification.
texts.text: Where, in cases referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, the controller is able to demonstrate that it is not in a position to identify the data subject, the controller shall inform the data subject accordingly, if possible. In such cases, Articles 15 to 20 shall not apply except where the data subject, for the purpose of exercising his or her rights under those articles, provides additional information enabling his or her identification.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHAPTER III
texts.text: CHAPTER III

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Rights of the data subject
texts.text: Rights of the data subject

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Section 1
texts.text: Section 1

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Transparency and modalities
texts.text: Transparency and modalities

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 12
texts.text: Article 12

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Transparent  information,  communication  and  modalities  for  the  exercise  of  the  rights  of  the  data subject
texts.text: Transparent  information,  communication  and  modalities  for  the  exercise  of  the  rights  of  the  data subject

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The controller shall take appropriate measures to provide any information referred to in Articles 13 and 14 and any communication under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 relating to processing to the data subject in a concise, transparent, intelligible and easily accessible form, using clear and plain language, in particular for any information addressed specifically to a child. The information shall be provided in writing, or by other means, including, where appropriate, by electronic means. When requested by the data subject, the information may be provided orally, provided that the identity of the data subject is proven by other means.
texts.text: The controller shall take appropriate measures to provide any information referred to in Articles 13 and 14 and any communication under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 relating to processing to the data subject in a concise, transparent, intelligible and easily accessible form, using clear and plain language, in particular for any information addressed specifically to a child. The information shall be provided in writing, or by other means, including, where appropriate, by electronic means. When requested by the data subject, the information may be provided orally, provided that the identity of the data subject is proven by other means.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The controller shall facilitate the exercise of data subject rights under Articles 15 to 22. In the cases referred to in Article 11(2), the controller shall not refuse to act on the request of the data subject for exercising his or her rights under Articles 15 to 22, unless the controller demonstrates that it is not in a position to identify the data subject.
texts.text: The controller shall facilitate the exercise of data subject rights under Articles 15 to 22. In the cases referred to in Article 11(2), the controller shall not refuse to act on the request of the data subject for exercising his or her rights under Articles 15 to 22, unless the controller demonstrates that it is not in a position to identify the data subject.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The controller shall provide information on action taken on a request under Articles 15 to 22 to the data subject without undue delay and in any event within one month of receipt of the request. That period may be extended by two further months where necessary, taking into account the complexity and number of the requests. The controller shall inform the data subject of any such extension within one month of receipt of the request, together with the reasons for the delay. Where the data subject makes the request by electronic form means, the information shall be provided by electronic means where possible, unless otherwise requested by the data subject.
texts.text: The controller shall provide information on action taken on a request under Articles 15 to 22 to the data subject without undue delay and in any event within one month of receipt of the request. That period may be extended by two further months where necessary, taking into account the complexity and number of the requests. The controller shall inform the data subject of any such extension within one month of receipt of the request, together with the reasons for the delay. Where the data subject makes the request by electronic form means, the information shall be provided by electronic means where possible, unless otherwise requested by the data subject.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: If the controller does not take action on the request of the data subject, the controller shall inform the data subject without delay and at the latest within one month of receipt of the request of the reasons for not taking action and on the possibility of lodging a complaint with a supervisory authority and seeking a judicial remedy.
texts.text: If the controller does not take action on the request of the data subject, the controller shall inform the data subject without delay and at the latest within one month of receipt of the request of the reasons for not taking action and on the possibility of lodging a complaint with a supervisory authority and seeking a judicial remedy.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Information provided under Articles 13 and 14 and any communication and any actions taken under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 shall be provided free of charge. Where requests from a data subject are manifestly unfounded or excessive, in particular because of their repetitive character, the controller may either:
texts.text: Information provided under Articles 13 and 14 and any communication and any actions taken under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 shall be provided free of charge. Where requests from a data subject are manifestly unfounded or excessive, in particular because of their repetitive character, the controller may either:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) charge a reasonable fee taking into account the administrative costs of providing the information or communication or taking the action requested; or
texts.text: (a) charge a reasonable fee taking into account the administrative costs of providing the information or communication or taking the action requested; or

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) refuse to act on the request.
texts.text: (b) refuse to act on the request.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The controller shall bear  the burden of demonstrating the manifestly unfounded or excessive character of the request.
texts.text: The controller shall bear  the burden of demonstrating the manifestly unfounded or excessive character of the request.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Without prejudice to Article 11, where the controller has reasonable doubts concerning the identity of the natural person making the request referred to in Articles 15 to 21, the controller may request the provision of additional information necessary to confirm the identity of the data subject.
texts.text: Without prejudice to Article 11, where the controller has reasonable doubts concerning the identity of the natural person making the request referred to in Articles 15 to 21, the controller may request the provision of additional information necessary to confirm the identity of the data subject.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The information to be provided to data subjects pursuant to Articles 13 and 14 may be provided in combination with standardised icons in order to give in an easily visible, intelligible and clearly legible manner a meaningful overview of the intended processing. Where the icons are presented electronically they shall be machine-readable.
texts.text: The information to be provided to data subjects pursuant to Articles 13 and 14 may be provided in combination with standardised icons in order to give in an easily visible, intelligible and clearly legible manner a meaningful overview of the intended processing. Where the icons are presented electronically they shall be machine-readable.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The Commission shall be empowered to adopt delegated acts in accordance with Article 92 for the purpose of determining the information to be presented by the icons and the procedures for providing standardised icons.
texts.text: The Commission shall be empowered to adopt delegated acts in accordance with Article 92 for the purpose of determining the information to be presented by the icons and the procedures for providing standardised icons.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Section 2
texts.text: Section 2

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Information and access to personal data
texts.text: Information and access to personal data

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 13
texts.text: Article 13

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Information to be provided where personal data are collected from the data subject
texts.text: Information to be provided where personal data are collected from the data subject

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Where personal data relating to a data subject are collected from the data subject, the controller shall, at the time when personal data are obtained, provide the data subject with all of the following information:
texts.text: Where personal data relating to a data subject are collected from the data subject, the controller shall, at the time when personal data are obtained, provide the data subject with all of the following information:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the identity and the contact details of the controller and, where applicable, of the controller's representative;
texts.text: (a) the identity and the contact details of the controller and, where applicable, of the controller's representative;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the contact details of the data protection officer, where applicable;
texts.text: (b) the contact details of the data protection officer, where applicable;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) the purposes of the processing for which the personal data are intended as well as the legal basis for the processing;
texts.text: (c) the purposes of the processing for which the personal data are intended as well as the legal basis for the processing;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) where the processing is based on point (f) of Article 6(1), the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party;
texts.text: (d) where the processing is based on point (f) of Article 6(1), the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) the recipients or categories of recipients of the personal data, if any;
texts.text: (e) the recipients or categories of recipients of the personal data, if any;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (f) where applicable, the fact that the controller intends to transfer personal data to a third country or international organisation and the existence or absence of an adequacy decision by the Commission, or in the case of transfers referred to in Article 46 or 47, or the second subparagraph of Article 49(1), reference to the appropriate or suitable safeguards and the means by which to obtain a copy of them or where they have been made available.
texts.text: (f) where applicable, the fact that the controller intends to transfer personal data to a third country or international organisation and the existence or absence of an adequacy decision by the Commission, or in the case of transfers referred to in Article 46 or 47, or the second subparagraph of Article 49(1), reference to the appropriate or suitable safeguards and the means by which to obtain a copy of them or where they have been made available.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: In addition to the information referred to in paragraph 1, the controller shall, at the time when personal data are obtained, provide the data subject with the following further information necessary to ensure fair and transparent processing:
texts.text: In addition to the information referred to in paragraph 1, the controller shall, at the time when personal data are obtained, provide the data subject with the following further information necessary to ensure fair and transparent processing:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the period for which the personal data will be stored, or if that is not possible, the criteria used to determine that period;
texts.text: (a) the period for which the personal data will be stored, or if that is not possible, the criteria used to determine that period;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the existence of the right to request from the controller access to and rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing concerning the data subject or to object to processing as well as the right to data portability;
texts.text: (b) the existence of the right to request from the controller access to and rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing concerning the data subject or to object to processing as well as the right to data portability;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) where the processing is based on point (a) of Article 6(1) or point (a) of Article 9(2), the existence of the right to withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal;
texts.text: (c) where the processing is based on point (a) of Article 6(1) or point (a) of Article 9(2), the existence of the right to withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority;
texts.text: (d) the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) whether the provision of personal data is a statutory or contractual requirement, or a requirement necessary to enter into a contract, as well as whether the data subject is obliged to provide the personal data and of the possible consequences of failure to provide such data;
texts.text: (e) whether the provision of personal data is a statutory or contractual requirement, or a requirement necessary to enter into a contract, as well as whether the data subject is obliged to provide the personal data and of the possible consequences of failure to provide such data;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (f) the existence of automated decision-making, including profiling, referred to in Article 22(1) and (4) and, at least in those cases, meaningful information about the logic involved, as well as the significance and the envisaged consequences of such processing for the data subject.
texts.text: (f) the existence of automated decision-making, including profiling, referred to in Article 22(1) and (4) and, at least in those cases, meaningful information about the logic involved, as well as the significance and the envisaged consequences of such processing for the data subject.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Where the controller intends to further process the personal data for a purpose other than that for which the personal data were collected, the controller shall provide the data subject prior to that further processing with information on that other purpose and with any relevant further information as referred to in paragraph 2.
texts.text: Where the controller intends to further process the personal data for a purpose other than that for which the personal data were collected, the controller shall provide the data subject prior to that further processing with information on that other purpose and with any relevant further information as referred to in paragraph 2.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Paragraphs 1, 2 and 3 shall not apply where and insofar as the data subject already has the information.
texts.text: Paragraphs 1, 2 and 3 shall not apply where and insofar as the data subject already has the information.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 14
texts.text: Article 14

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Information to be provided where personal data have not been obtained from the data subject
texts.text: Information to be provided where personal data have not been obtained from the data subject

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Where personal data have not been obtained from the data subject, the controller shall provide the data subject with the following information:
texts.text: Where personal data have not been obtained from the data subject, the controller shall provide the data subject with the following information:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the identity and the contact details of the controller and, where applicable, of the controller's representative;
texts.text: (a) the identity and the contact details of the controller and, where applicable, of the controller's representative;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the contact details of the data protection officer, where applicable;
texts.text: (b) the contact details of the data protection officer, where applicable;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) the purposes of the processing for which the personal data are intended as well as the legal basis for the processing;
texts.text: (c) the purposes of the processing for which the personal data are intended as well as the legal basis for the processing;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) the categories of personal data concerned;
texts.text: (d) the categories of personal data concerned;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) the recipients or categories of recipients of the personal data, if any;
texts.text: (e) the recipients or categories of recipients of the personal data, if any;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (f) where applicable, that the controller intends to transfer personal data to a recipient in a third country or internat­ ional organisation and the existence or absence of an adequacy decision by the Commission, or in the case of transfers referred to in Article 46 or 47, or the second subparagraph of Article 49(1), reference to the appropriate or suitable safeguards and the means to obtain a copy of them or where they have been made available.
texts.text: (f) where applicable, that the controller intends to transfer personal data to a recipient in a third country or internat ional organisation and the existence or absence of an adequacy decision by the Commission, or in the case of transfers referred to in Article 46 or 47, or the second subparagraph of Article 49(1), reference to the appropriate or suitable safeguards and the means to obtain a copy of them or where they have been made available.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: In addition to the information referred to in paragraph 1, the controller shall provide the data subject with the following information necessary to ensure fair and transparent processing in respect of the data subject:
texts.text: In addition to the information referred to in paragraph 1, the controller shall provide the data subject with the following information necessary to ensure fair and transparent processing in respect of the data subject:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the period for which the personal data will be stored, or if that is not possible, the criteria used to determine that period;
texts.text: (a) the period for which the personal data will be stored, or if that is not possible, the criteria used to determine that period;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) where the processing is based on point (f) of Article 6(1), the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party;
texts.text: (b) where the processing is based on point (f) of Article 6(1), the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) the existence of the right to request from the controller access to and rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing concerning the data subject and to object to processing as well as the right to data portability;
texts.text: (c) the existence of the right to request from the controller access to and rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing concerning the data subject and to object to processing as well as the right to data portability;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) where processing is based on point (a) of Article 6(1) or point (a) of Article 9(2), the existence of the right to withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal;
texts.text: (d) where processing is based on point (a) of Article 6(1) or point (a) of Article 9(2), the existence of the right to withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (e) the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority;
texts.text: (e) the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (f) from which source the personal data originate, and if applicable, whether it came from publicly accessible sources;
texts.text: (f) from which source the personal data originate, and if applicable, whether it came from publicly accessible sources;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (g) the existence of automated decision-making, including profiling, referred to in Article 22(1) and (4) and, at least in those cases, meaningful information about the logic involved, as well as the significance and the envisaged consequences of such processing for the data subject.
texts.text: (g) the existence of automated decision-making, including profiling, referred to in Article 22(1) and (4) and, at least in those cases, meaningful information about the logic involved, as well as the significance and the envisaged consequences of such processing for the data subject.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The controller shall provide the information referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2:
texts.text: The controller shall provide the information referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) within a reasonable period after obtaining the personal data, but at the latest within one month, having regard to the specific circumstances in which the personal data are processed;
texts.text: (a) within a reasonable period after obtaining the personal data, but at the latest within one month, having regard to the specific circumstances in which the personal data are processed;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) if the personal data are to be used for communication with the data subject, at the latest at the time of the first communication to that data subject; or
texts.text: (b) if the personal data are to be used for communication with the data subject, at the latest at the time of the first communication to that data subject; or

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) if a disclosure to another recipient is envisaged, at the latest when the personal data are first disclosed.
texts.text: (c) if a disclosure to another recipient is envisaged, at the latest when the personal data are first disclosed.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Where the controller intends to further process the personal data for a purpose other than that for which the personal data were obtained, the controller shall provide the data subject prior to that further processing with information on that other purpose and with any relevant further information as referred to in paragraph 2.
texts.text: Where the controller intends to further process the personal data for a purpose other than that for which the personal data were obtained, the controller shall provide the data subject prior to that further processing with information on that other purpose and with any relevant further information as referred to in paragraph 2.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Paragraphs 1 to 4 shall not apply where and insofar as:
texts.text: Paragraphs 1 to 4 shall not apply where and insofar as:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the data subject already has the information;
texts.text: (a) the data subject already has the information;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the provision of such information proves impossible or would involve a disproportionate effort, in particular for processing for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes, subject to the conditions and safeguards referred to in Article 89(1) or in so far as the obligation referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article is likely to render impossible or seriously impair the achievement of the objectives of that processing. In such cases the controller shall take appropriate measures to protect the data subject's rights and freedoms and legitimate interests, including making the information publicly available;
texts.text: (b) the provision of such information proves impossible or would involve a disproportionate effort, in particular for processing for archiving purposes in the public interest, scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes, subject to the conditions and safeguards referred to in Article 89(1) or in so far as the obligation referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article is likely to render impossible or seriously impair the achievement of the objectives of that processing. In such cases the controller shall take appropriate measures to protect the data subject's rights and freedoms and legitimate interests, including making the information publicly available;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) obtaining or disclosure is expressly laid down by Union or Member State law to which the controller is subject and which provides appropriate measures to protect the data subject's legitimate interests; or
texts.text: (c) obtaining or disclosure is expressly laid down by Union or Member State law to which the controller is subject and which provides appropriate measures to protect the data subject's legitimate interests; or

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (d) where the personal data must remain confidential subject to an obligation of professional secrecy regulated by Union or Member State law, including a statutory obligation of secrecy.
texts.text: (d) where the personal data must remain confidential subject to an obligation of professional secrecy regulated by Union or Member State law, including a statutory obligation of secrecy.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Article 15
texts.text: Article 15

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Right of access by the data subject
texts.text: Right of access by the data subject

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller confirmation as to whether or not personal data concerning him or her are being processed, and, where that is the case, access to the personal data and the following information:
texts.text: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller confirmation as to whether or not personal data concerning him or her are being processed, and, where that is the case, access to the personal data and the following information:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) the purposes of the processing;
texts.text: (a) the purposes of the processing;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) the categories of personal data concerned;
texts.text: (b) the categories of personal data concerned;

texts.label: list_item
